seoTitle: Upper Mangrove vs Upper Manilla — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Upper Mangrove and Upper Manilla. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Upper Mangrove vs Upper Manilla: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Upper Mangrove and Upper Manilla.
heading: Upper Mangrove vs Upper Manilla — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Upper Mangrove, New South Wales and Upper Manilla, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Upper Manilla has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Upper Mangrove (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Upper Mangrove or Upper Manilla safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Upper Mangrove has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Upper Manilla scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Upper Mangrove scores 18/100 for bushfire risk. Upper Manilla scores 40/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Upper Mangrove or Upper Manilla?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Upper Manilla has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.68% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
